speaker: Seeker
text: Aur guilt bhi hota hai ki shayad main hi ghar ka mahaul kharab kar dunga agar bol diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breadwinner aur log-kya-kahenge context mein guilt normalise karke worth separate karna.
text: Jahan mard aur breadwinner pe ghar sambhalne ka pura dabav hota hai, wahan aisa guilt bahut common hai; isse tumhari keemat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi, par andar se thak gaya hoon. Har baat ko hospital ka kharcha bolke cover karna mushkil ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Family-provider world ka common hidden pattern batakar akelapan kam karna.
text: Breadwinner role mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki sabko lagta hai provider ko hamesha sakht hi dikhna chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon jo practical ho aur ghar ko jhatka bhi na lage?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 quick, duty-compatible options dena.
text: Teen chhote options: (1) raat ko 1 line note - 'aaj ka sabse heavy pal'; (2) subah nikalte waqt 6 slow breaths; (3) ek trusted dost ko text - 'thoda rough chal raha hai, 5 min sun lena'.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye manageable lag raha hai. Ek line note se start kar sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek-line routine ko step-by-step lock karna.
text: Pehle aaj raat bed pe baith ke phone notes kholo. Phir likho: 'aaj ka sabse heavy pal ___'. Phir save karo aur bas. Itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, itna kar lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 stigma ko personal flaw nahi, samajik framing ke roop mein reframe karna.
text: Hamare context mein dimaagi halat ko izzat se jod diya jata hai, isliye log chhupate hain; yeh tumhari galti nahi, system ka dabav hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par ghar walon ka darr fir bhi bacha hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se ghar walon ke reaction ka darr reflect karna.
text: Tumhara concern abhi bhi wahi hai ki unka reaction poore ghar ka balance bigad sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad poora sach baad mein. Abhi sirf thakan aur pressure wali baat bolna better hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gradual disclosure ke liye 2 low-conflict scripts dena.
text: Do lines ready rakho: 'Pichhle dinon se pressure zyada hai, thoda support chahiye' ya 'Main better hone pe kaam kar raha hoon, details dheere bolunga'.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isse control aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Balanced pacing ko reinforce karke worth ko outcome se alag rakhna.
text: Tumne bahut grounded tareeka nikala hai - ghar ka dhyaan bhi aur apni saans ko jagah bhi; tumhari value kisi perfect mask par depend nahi karti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab lag raha hai sakht dikhna padta hai ka matlab chup rehna zaroori nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se role ke naye meaning ko mirror karna.
text: Tum role nibha rahe ho, bas ab apni saans ko bhi us role ka hissa bana rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj ek dost ko message bhejunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Low-friction message template dena taaki action turant ho.
text: Template ready: 'Bhai, thoda heavy chal raha hai, 5 min sun lena.' Itna hi bhejna kaafi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh line sahi hai, bhej dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Long-term pressure mein micro support ko sustainability frame mein normalise karna.
text: Jo log lambi zimmedari uthate hain, unke liye chhota support lena stamina bachata hai - yeh breakdown nahi, sustainability hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj ke halka-pan ko kal ki continuity se jodna.
text: Aaj ka yeh halka-pan agar repeat hua toh kal ka din bhi thoda aasaan lagega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, aaj se start karta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Start commitment ko validate karna bina extra pressure.
text: Yahi smart strength hai - chhota par lagataar kadam.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aaj ke liye kaafi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se ghar aur khud dono ko saath rakhne wali line mirror karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, filhaal itna enough hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter
